scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build -w apps/showcase && npm run build -w apps/blotter
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/expression && tsc -p packages/calc && tsc -p packages/rules && tsc -p packages/format && tsc -p packages/renderers && tsc -p packages/edit && tsc -p packages/ext && tsc -p packages/core && tsc -p packages/react && tsc -p apps/showcase && tsc -p apps/blotter && tsc -p apps/agref
scripts.test:worker: npm run worker-compare && npm run worker-budget
